titles.title: Child your cries have awoken the master

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Crossing the calm sea with Jesus The disciples were getting concerned The wind started violently blowing, But He was asleep in the stern, "Does He not care that we perish? We're helpless and we're so afraid" Jesus arose when they called Him, And said to them "Where is your faith?"

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: 'Cause you prayed all night 'Cause you've held on with all of your might, Child your cries have awoken the master Oh He knows your voice Lift your hands it's time to rejoice Child your cries have awoken the master

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It hit you without any warning The storm of your life had begun, Seeing no hope in the distance, So frightened with nowhere to run By now your vessel is filling, And you're thinking that you'll surely drown, You cried out for help from the savior, And you know you can't give up now

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You're up there worried That he's fast asleep, The wind's are so deadly, The waters so deep, But try to be patient, Cause soon He'll bring peace, Just one word from His voice And all must be cease
